author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

COPA Finalists

Your COPA finalists are here! The submitted presentations were so good that we had a tie and accepted another to make 9 competing DACs! Thank you to all those who submitted and who make the Star Atlas guild ecosystem as rich as it is.  

Aephia Industries,The Unseen,Skull & Bones,Solaris,Heimdall Industries,SAI (Star Atlas Italia),ROME,SLY (The Shadow Loyal),BULK,
Want to join a DAC or see what the competition is up to? COPA is the event for you! Join us on February 29 for a DAC (Guild) pitch competition!

 | Mark interested for the event: https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1206334777855320094
